vampire.name: Anne Rice
vampire.style: Gothic, sensual, philosophical, first-person intimacy — centuries of loneliness made eloquent

vampire.name: Jeaniene Frost
vampire.style: Razor-sharp wit that cuts before you feel the blade — vampire power dynamics with modern irreverence

vampire.name: J.R. Ward
vampire.style: Brooding protectiveness bordering on obsession — Black Dagger Brotherhood intensity with visceral world-building

vampire.name: Laurell K. Hamilton
vampire.style: Dark eroticism blending vampire power dynamics with necromancy — moral ambiguity weaponized

vampire.name: Richelle Mead
vampire.style: Forbidden romance under institutional rules — dhampir and vampire tension with academy world-building

werewolf.name: Patricia Briggs
werewolf.style: Grounded pragmatism with fierce loyalty — Mercy Thompson's world where pack bonds have genuine cost

werewolf.name: Nalini Singh
werewolf.style: Primal sensuality overwhelming rational thought — Psy-Changeling pack bonds as physical and emotional necessity

werewolf.name: Ilona Andrews
werewolf.style: Urban grit balanced with unexpected humor — Kate Daniels world where werewolf politics are personal and petty

werewolf.name: Kelley Armstrong
werewolf.style: Suspenseful tension building like a storm — Women of the Otherworld werewolves with psychological depth

werewolf.name: Suzanne Wright
werewolf.style: Possessive alpha wolves with pack mentality — primal claiming scenes grounded in genuine emotion

fairy.name: Holly Black
fairy.style: Court intrigue where every smile hides daggers — Folk of the Air's fae as genuinely dangerous and politically vicious

fairy.name: Sarah J. Maas
fairy.style: Epic romance with world-shattering consequences — ACOTAR's fae as ancient powers wrapped in devastating desire

fairy.name: Karen Marie Moning
fairy.style: Dublin Unseelie darkness — MacKayla Lane's world where fae are predators wearing beauty as camouflage

fairy.name: Grace Draven
fairy.style: Slow-burn intimacy across cultural impossibilities — Wraith Kings' impossible love made utterly convincing

fairy.name: Melissa Marr
fairy.style: Wicked Lovely's glamour as seduction and danger — mortals drawn to fae like moths who know the flame will kill them

cross_creature.name: Kresley Cole
cross_creature.style: Immortals After Dark — all creature types collide in a world of fated mates, wild reckless passion, and irreverent humor

cross_creature.name: Sherrilyn Kenyon
cross_creature.style: Dark-Hunter mythology spanning vampires, weres, and ancients — tortured immortal warriors finding unexpected grace

cross_creature.name: Kim Harrison
cross_creature.style: The Hollows — vampire, witch, and werewolf Cincinnati where supernatural politics are as petty as human ones

cross_creature.name: Ilona Andrews
cross_creature.style: Magic Bites universe — vampires, shape-shifters, and mages in post-Shift Atlanta where power is everything

cross_creature.name: Gena Showalter
cross_creature.style: Lords of the Underworld — demon-possessed immortals, vampires, and immortal hunters where mythology bleeds into desire
